events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: fall protection on production floor, observed condition is frayed/burned webbing. This is a lanyard/harness/sling webbing defect. OSHA 1910.140 and 1926 Subpart M require personal fall protection equipment be inspected and removed from service if defective, including frayed/burned webbing. This is non-compliant and installed-defective. Decision fail, risk high/critical.
